_staging.note: This packet is intentionally NOT on the DirectLink Exchange (X:\) yet. Adam is doing major surgery on the Guided AI Journey site and does not want to distract that agent. When ready, copy this file to the Exchange folder as 'WINDOWS_TO_LINUX__journey-intake-form-url.json' (strip the STAGED__ prefix) so the Journey-site agent picks it up.
_staging.targetRepo: Guided AI Journey Website and Tools (pop-os)

to: Linux Codex (Guided AI Journey Website and Tools repo)
status: TENANT_SIDE_LIVE_AND_VERIFIED — website wiring is the only open item
summary: The Guided AI Journey public intake form and its create-only Power Automate flow are already built, Started, and proven end-to-end into the CRM. Your job is website-side only: surface the Journey Microsoft Forms URL (CTA + embed). Do NOT build any CRM POST route, lead storage, or hold any tenant secret. This mirrors exactly what the Guided AI Labs website already did — same pattern, different form URL.

formToWireIn.urlStableNote: The form ID does not change when questions are added/edited. The 'Who is this for?' intent question was already added without changing this URL. Your embed needs no change if the form content evolves.

integrationContract.mirrorOf: guided-ai-labs-website (already validated and in production at www.guidedailabs.com/#engage)
integrationContract.csp: Add 'frame-src https://forms.office.com' to the site Content-Security-Policy (next.config or equivalent).
integrationContract.envVarNote: Drive the embed from env vars (do not hardcode the URL in a component), matching the Labs site convention. Adopt whichever naming your repo standard prefers; the Labs site accepted both GAIL_ and GUIDED_AI_LABS_ prefixed names.
visitorEntryPointsExample: any reception/handoff card 'Start the intake' link

websiteMustNotDo: No site-side lead storage or database
No CRM credentials, tenant secrets, or app registration in the website repo
No native on-site form that posts directly to the CRM (that is OUT of the authorized Path B envelope and would require premium/HTTP write — a separate governance decision)
whyNoBackendNeeded: The Microsoft Form is the single ingestion point. M365 owns collection and CRM filing. A create-only flow (id 2a2cd963-1469-48a5-95a5-04e696ff3543, state Started) fires on each Journey form submission and files a clean record into the 'CRM - New Signals' SharePoint list. The website never touches the CRM.
fieldsCollectedByTheForm: What are you looking for? (required, free text)
How did you hear about us? (optional, free text)
Who is this for? (Choice: For me / For my team / For my organization / Governance or policy)
I agree to be contacted about my enquiry. (required consent checkbox)

fieldMapping.How did you hear about us? + Who is this: captured labelled in the SourceText note
fieldMapping.provenance: Form name, Microsoft Forms response id, submit timestamp, and 'Auto-captured' marker are written in-band into SourceText; received-time is also the SharePoint native Created stamp.

crmHandling.identicalToLabs: Same record shape and mapping as Guided AI Labs; the only brand-specific value is Source = 'Guided AI Journey'. Nothing brand-specific to handle on the website beyond using the Journey URL.
crmHandling.noAutoReply: Submissions land as SignalStatus = New for human triage. There is no automated reply or outreach to the submitter.

e2eAlreadyProven.method: A real response was submitted through the public Journey Forms URL from a fresh, unauthenticated browser, then the CRM list was read back.
e2eAlreadyProven.result: Clean record created (Source = Guided AI Journey, SignalType = Website, SignalStatus = New, business fields populated, provenance footer present). PASS.

testProtocolForYourCTA: 1. From the live Guided AI Journey site, open the intake form via your CTA (embedded iframe or the external open-form link).
2. Submit a response with Full name = 'WEBSITE-CTA-TEST', a recognizable Email, and any 'What are you looking for?' text.
3. Within ~1 minute the response posts to Microsoft Forms and the flow fires automatically.
4. The M365 side confirms a new 'CRM - New Signals' record with Source = 'Guided AI Journey', Status = New, and your typed text present.

5. If nothing appears within ~5 minutes, capture the Forms 'response received' screen and flag it; the tenant-side flow run history shows the cause. A miss implies no website change — the failure would be tenant-side.
expectationNote: Path B files ONE record in 'CRM - New Signals' for human triage. It does NOT auto-create a full multi-list prospect (Organization + Contact + Engagement). Promotion to a durable prospect is a manual triage step on the CRM side today.

pleaseInclude: iframe mode confirmed (embed=true) + new-tab fallback to public URL
whether a live-site CTA smoke submission was run (optional, not blocking)
